title: astragalus phlomoides
intro: Astragalus phlomoides, also known as Phlomoides or Mongolian milkvetch, is a plant species belonging to the legume family. It is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Asia, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory properties, which are believed to contribute to its health benefits, including reducing stress, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Astragalus phlomoides is typically prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its effects.
